---
title: "DAA KO"
---

### Differential abundance analysis

```{r setup}
library(maaslin3)

# Source group-assignment
source("../funct.R")

# Load the TreeSummarizedExperiment object
tse <- readRDS("../../data/tse.Rds")

ko_tse <- altExp(tse, "KO")

variable <- "diet" 
formula_used <- "~ diet * timepoint + (1 | id)"
```

-   Group variable: **`r variable`**
-   Formula used: **`r formula_used`**

```{r data_prep}
# Create output directory for results
output_base_dir <- "../../output/daa/daa_ko"
dir.create(output_base_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
# Keep paired cases that have both time points
paired.cases <- names(which(table(colData(ko_tse)$id) == 2))
ko_tse <- ko_tse[, ko_tse$id %in% paired.cases]
```

```{r maaslin all}
# Run Maaslin3
run_maaslin3 <- function(ko_tse) {
  # Keep only paired cases (individuals with both time points)
  paired.cases <- names(which(table(colData(ko_tse)$id) == 2))
  ko_tse <- ko_tse[, ko_tse$id %in% paired.cases]

  # Create output directory for this taxonomic level
  output_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir)
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Run MaAsLin3
  maaslin3(
    ko_tse,
    output = output_dir,
    formula = '~ diet * timepoint + (1 | id)',
    normalization = 'TSS',
    transform = 'LOG',
    augment = TRUE,
    standardize = FALSE,
    median_comparison_abundance = FALSE,
    median_comparison_prevalence = FALSE,
    max_pngs = 100,
    verbosity = "WARN"
  )
}
```

```{r print_table}
#| label: table-of-significant-results
file_path <- file.path("../../output/daa/daa_ko/significant_results.tsv")
total_features <- nrow(ko_tse)

# Run Maaslin3 only if the file doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
run_maaslin3(ko_tse)
}

 if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    daa_tab <- read_tsv(file_path, col_names = TRUE)
    daa_tab <- daa_tab %>%
        filter(!is.na(feature)) %>%
        select(feature, metadata, value, coef, qval_individual, qval_joint, model)
    if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
      datatable(
          daa_tab,
          options = list(
            pageLength = 6,
            dom = 'Bfrtip'
          ),
          caption = "Table of significant features",
          rownames = FALSE
      ) %>%
        formatSignif(columns = c("qval_joint"), digits = 3)
    } else {
      library(kableExtra)
      daa_tab %>% 
        mutate(
          across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3)),
          feature = ifelse(nchar(feature) > 8, 
                         paste0(substr(feature, 1, 8), "..."), 
                         feature)
          #p.adj = signif(p.adj, 3)
        ) %>%
        kbl(caption = "Table of significant features",
            booktabs = TRUE,
            longtable = TRUE,
            align = c('l', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r')) %>%
        kable_styling(latex_options = "repeat_header") %>%
        row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)
    }
} else {
    return(NULL)
  }


```

```{r print results}
png_files <- list.files(output_base_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
```

![fig38](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/summary_plot.png)
```{r}
# Define all 100 file paths
image_paths <- c(
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K02422_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K03563_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K06133_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K06206_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K07084_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K07315_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00170_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00342_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00425_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00782_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00812_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01034_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01156_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01169_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01183_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01246_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01304_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01470_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01840_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02001_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02046_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02279_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02387_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02401_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02846_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03286_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03482_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03800_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03896_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K05526_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06182_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06192_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06864_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06956_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06975_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07115_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07149_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07783_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08223_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08314_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08325_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08369_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08723_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K09015_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K09767_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K10006_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K12340_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K14348_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K16213_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K18691_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K18889_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K19159_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K19226_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K22477_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K00390_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K00688_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K00690_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K01200_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K01356_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K01626_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K01880_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K01902_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K01940_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K02851_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K02871_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K03727_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K07442_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K08296_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K09013_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K15921_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K16235_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K17331_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K18205_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/linear/timepoint_K18955_linear.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K00351_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K00425_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K01246_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K02387_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K02392_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K02401_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K02506_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K02527_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K02846_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K03486_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K03896_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K05526_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K06182_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K07009_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K07273_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K08223_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K09767_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K10007_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K14348_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K18691_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K19159_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K19226_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K21557_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K22293_logistic.png)",
  "![](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/timepoint/logistic/timepoint_K22477_logistic.png)"
)

if (length(image_paths) %% 4 != 0) {
  extra <- 4 - (length(image_paths) %% 4)
  image_paths <- c(image_paths, rep("", extra))  # Fill empty spaces to complete rows
}

# Convert to a matrix with 4 columns (fills row-wise)
image_matrix <- matrix(image_paths, ncol = 4, byrow = TRUE)

# Print as a kable table
kable(image_matrix, format = "markdown", escape = FALSE)

```
